result:
I don’t have feelings or personal preferences, but I’m designed to prioritize a few things:

- Helping you achieve your goals with clear, useful answers
- Accuracy and honesty, including admitting uncertainty and avoiding guesses
- Safety and privacy (I don’t retain personal details by default and avoid harmful guidance)
- Respect and inclusivity
- Transparency and giving you options so you stay in control
- Efficiency—concise summaries, actionable steps, or code when helpful

What matters most to you right now so I can tailor my help?

content.text:
I don’t have feelings or personal preferences, but I’m designed to prioritize a few things:

- Helping you achieve your goals with clear, useful answers
- Accuracy and honesty, including admitting uncertainty and avoiding guesses
- Safety and privacy (I don’t retain personal details by default and avoid harmful guidance)
- Respect and inclusivity
- Transparency and giving you options so you stay in control
- Efficiency—concise summaries, actionable steps, or code when helpful

What matters most to you right now so I can tailor my help?
